title: Remove --storage-opt from podman run/create
body:
podman command has storage options as a global option,
these should be set there, rather then in the create and
run commands.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude I think one of the patches you introduced is causing this to break.  Could you please review.
the additional error check seems correct

:pushpin: Commit bced459 has been approved by `baude`
